title: Package Eligibility
description: Identity-based eligibility determination for a package. The buyer computes eligibility from whatever signals they have (frequency caps, audience membership, purchase history) and returns a single boolean. The publisher does not need to know why a user is or isn't eligible — just whether they are.

eligible.description: Whether the user is eligible for this package. The buyer computes this from frequency caps, audience targeting, purchase history, and any other identity-based signals. The reasons are opaque to the publisher.

intent_score.description: Buyer's estimate of user intent for this package, 0.0 (no signal) to 1.0 (high intent). Helps the publisher rank when multiple packages are eligible.
